mapper.sql: result_id, execution_id, step_id, status, start_time, end_time, error_message, screenshot, log, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, deleted, created_by, updated_by, deleted_by
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_step_result
status = #{status}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, screenshot = #{screenshot}, log = #{log}, updated_by = #{updatedBy},
WHERE result_id = #{resultId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE t_step_result SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), deleted_by = #{deletedBy} WHERE result_id = #{resultId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_step_result SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_step_result WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY step_id ASC
SELECT FROM t_step_result WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND step_id = #{stepId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE t_step_result SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE result_id = #{resultId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM t_step_result WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY status
